unit.name: feed helper, embed/oEmbed local routing, and HTTPS detection/migration behavior
unit.area: src/wp-includes/feed.php src/wp-includes/class-wp-oembed.php src/wp-includes/class-wp-embed.php src/wp-includes/embed.php src/wp-includes/https-detection.php src/wp-includes/https-migration.php
unit.public_contract: This fixture executes copied WordPress 7.0 feed, embed/oEmbed, and HTTPS source against deterministic in-process hooks/options. It does not perform remote feed fetches, remote oEmbed provider requests, live HTTPS probing, feed template rendering, installed behavior, upstream PHPUnit parity, or generated public PHP replacement.

bridge.removal_gate: Replace copied public PHP with generated original-path adapters and pass feed template/rendering, remote fetch/oEmbed discovery, HTTPS probing, installed distribution, and selected upstream PHPUnit gates before claiming public PHP ownership.
